mapper.select:
SELECT tn.notice_id, tn.title, tn.category, tn.is_public, tn.is_pinned, tn.status, tn.publish_time, tn.create_time, ts.nick_name AS create_name FROM tb_notice tn LEFT JOIN tb_sys_user ts ON tn.create_by = ts.user_id
AND tn.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND tn.status = #{status}
ORDER BY tn.is_pinned DESC, COALESCE(tn.publish_time, tn.create_time) DESC
